product_boundaries: Readiness workflow only; no compliance certification.
FDA-style sortable export language is allowed, but no FDA endorsement.
No legal advice or automated exemption determination.
Keep the product a lightweight traceability workflow layer, not ERP.

summary: GSD project initialization and Phase 1 context exist.
The CI contract gate and MockRecall contract smoke check already exist.
Batch 21 reviewed MockRecall OpenAPI examples and found no repair was needed.
Batch 22 reconciled active truth surfaces without runtime changes.
Batch 24 documented the Phase 2 MockRecall Problem Details verification scope without runtime expansion.
current_state.ci_contract_gate: .github/workflows/contract-gate.yml runs npm ci, npm run api:check, npm run typecheck, npm run build, and npm run test:mock-recall:contract on push and pull request events.
current_state.mock_recall_contract_smoke: tests/mock-recall-contract-smoke.mjs verifies the current contract fixture and missing-resource Problem Details behavior against a production Next server.
current_state.mock_recall_examples_review: Batch 21 found the MockRecall detail, packet CSV, and 404 Problem Details examples aligned with runtime fixture intent; api/openapi.yaml was unchanged.
current_state.mock_recall_not_found_handlers: Runtime verified in Batch 8 and protected by the committed MockRecall contract smoke check.
current_state.mock_recall_detail_success_shape: One contract fixture exists for runtime smoke checks; no persisted or storage-backed success flow exists yet.
current_state.phase_1_goal: Maintainers can validate the API contract repeatably and rely on reviewed MockRecallDetail/packet examples before runtime expansion.
current_state.phase_2_goal: The existing not-found Problem Details behavior is protected by committed verification, with that scope documented and runtime expansion explicitly deferred.
current_state.phase_2_verification_scope: tests/mock-recall-contract-smoke.mjs protects: missing mock recall detail returns 404 application/problem+json; missing packet CSV returns 404 application/problem+json (not text/csv); the Problem Details body includes type, title, status, detail, and instance; success coverage remains the single static contract fixture only.

remaining_absences: No persisted or storage-backed mock-recall runtime payloads beyond the contract smoke fixture.

next_recommended_actions.action: Phase 2 verification scope is documented; treat tests/mock-recall-contract-smoke.mjs and .github/workflows/contract-gate.yml as the protected baseline and do not duplicate them unless verified drift requires it.
Do not begin runtime success expansion, persistence, auth, tenant, RBAC, audit, idempotency, or production CSV work; these require an approved Phase 3+ batch.

critical_do_not_expand_without_approval: Database, storage, auth, RBAC, middleware, audit log, route success behavior, generated types, package files, tests, fixtures, imports, exports, CSV generation, UI, supplier portal, OCR, ERP integration, and runtime traceability logic unless covered by the approved phase plan.
